message:
🧹 Zero arbitrary-tw-color ratchet and remove 5 unused UI constants (#10276)

Add linkedin, terminal, and glass-overlay colors to Tailwind config,
replacing all 9 hardcoded hex values in arbitrary Tailwind classes
across 6 files. Remove 5 unused exports from lib/constants/ui.ts
(CHART_TOOLTIP_BORDER_RADIUS, CHART_LEGEND_WRAPPER_STYLE,
CHART_LEGEND_WRAPPER_STYLE_SM, CHART_BODY_FONT_SIZE_SM,
DEV_BAR_HEIGHT_PX).

Fixes #10271

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

files.patch: @@ -627,7 +627,7 @@ export function LinkedInShareButton({ onShare, compact = false }: { onShare?: () return (
